location: In a treasure chest inside a Messmer soldier encampment south of the Castle Front Site of Grace in Gravesite Plain, sitting under a tent beside barrels; the camp is held by a group of Perfumers and Messmer Soldiers.

source.name: Treasure chest under a tent in the Perfumer/Messmer Soldier camp south of Castle Front

tactics: From Castle Front, head south to a campfire where three Perfumers are gathered — they throw ranged perfume attacks, so closing distance quickly or picking them off from range helps avoid getting swarmed.
Messmer Soldiers are mixed in with the Perfumers; expect a multi-enemy fight rather than a single target before you can loot the chest safely.
The chest is under a tent near barrels — easy to overlook amid the tents/crates, keep an eye out after clearing the camp.
This is once-per-playthrough loot inside Messmer's crusade encampment territory east of Ellac Greatbridge.
lore: This bottle is a relic of Messmer's crusade against the Shadow Land's inhabitants — a reminder that the realm's perfumers weren't brought along to tend the wounded, but to help burn the enemy down.

builds.name: Pure Dex Fire build
builds.why: Scales only with Dexterity (C rising to B) while dealing pure fire damage, letting a Dex-focused character add elemental fire pressure without spending points in Int or Faith.
